coverage: All five authored input sweeps execute with exact vertex and face counts and local bounds within 0.0001 units of Blender.
validation: Split Edges processes mesh components inside instances, matching Blender autosmooth topology. Curve Tangent now consumes Resample Curve's evaluated normalized-segment-bisector frame instead of rebuilding a length-weighted chord; the 39 pre-twist instance transforms match Blender within 0.000086 units.

groups.surface: roughness 2/15 mace ball and zero-roughness polished chain

materialParity.evidence: The exact soup contains an 18,620-triangle chrome.002 range and a 206,528-triangle null range. Blender's realized mesh has slots [chrome.002, null], assigns all 214,718 faces to slot zero, and carries rough=2 on the 9,310 mace faces while the joined chain resolves it to zero. The authored Mapping output drives Noise Scale while Noise Vector stays zero, so Blender produces a constant mapped value of 1/15 rather than spatial grain; the browser now reproduces roughness 2/15 on the mace and zero on the chain. A 768px aligned WebGL capture lowers luminance MAE from 0.5291 to 0.5178, but remains 0.4731 mean luminance above Blender because the page still uses Three.js RoomEnvironment plus hemisphere/directional lights instead of Blender's dark studio world and two area lights. Geometry and material parameters are matched; authored-lighting parity remains pending.
